  "findings": [
    "Missing supplemental grounding electrode as required by NEC 250.53(A)(2) when a single rod, pipe, or plate electrode is used."
  ],
  "actions": [
    "Install a second supplemental grounding electrode (such as a second ground rod) spaced at least 6 feet apart from the first electrode, and bond them together."
  ],
  "rationale": "Under NEC 250.53(A)(2), a single rod, pipe, or plate electrode must be supplemented by an additional electrode of a type specified in 250.52(A)(2) through (A)(8), unless the single electrode has a resistance to earth of 25 ohms or less. Since a supplemental electrode is missing and no resistance test was documented to prove 25 ohms or less, the installation fails compliance.",
  "references": [
    "NEC 250.50",
    "NEC 250.53(A)(2)",
    "NEC 250.56"
  ]
}
